# SSE event surface captured from coms-go serve (Go reference — mirrors bun scripts/coms-net-server.ts output)
# Format: one event block per line group; placeholders used for dynamic values.
# Capture procedure: see README.md.

event: hello
id: 1
data: {"server_id":"<ulid>","server_time":"<iso>"}

event: pool_snapshot
id: 2
data: {"project":"default","agents":[]}
